_comments.providerKey: Unique identifier for this provider (used as ID, auto-formatted to display name)
_comments.apiKey: Your LiteLLM API key (stored in plain text - ensure file permissions are restrictive)
_comments.providerName: OPTIONAL: Custom display name (if omitted, auto-formats providerKey: 'litellm-prod' → 'Litellm Prod')
_comments.enabled: OPTIONAL: Set to false to temporarily disable this endpoint (default: true)
_comments.fallbackToCache: If true, use cached model/budget data when endpoint is unreachable (default: true)
_comments.timeout: Request timeout in milliseconds (default: 30ms, example shows 10000ms)
_comments.budgetPollInterval: How often to poll budget data in milliseconds (default: 60ms, example shows 60000ms = 1 minute)

_installation.2: Replace placeholder values with your actual LiteLLM endpoint details
_installation.4: Install the plugin: opencode plugin add /path/to/plugins/oclitellmac-server
_installation.5: Restart OpenCode to load the configuration
